title: The Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens Creators Keep Returning To
subtitle: Sushi, noodles, Thai, Indian, Japanese
angle: the Asian kitchens generating the most creator coverage this quarter. The dishes the city is filming and the restaurants behind them.
intro:
Everyday Noodles in Squirrel Hill has no Instagram account, no TikTok presence, and creators have already filmed inside. Two of them this quarter, three thousand plays. That is what happens when the room is good enough that the absence of a feed does not matter.

Pittsburgh's Asian kitchens are generating some of the most consistent creator attention in the city this spring, and the kitchens themselves have not all caught up. Pusadee's Garden ranks first among Pittsburgh Thai restaurants on conversation volume, running a feed that posts roughly twice a month and nothing on short-form video. Mola in East Liberty leads on sushi by review depth alone, with a feed that has gone nearly quiet. Atarashi in Oakland holds the same top sushi ranking with newer activity and a recent review trail pulling sentiment in a complicated direction.

What the data says this quarter is simple. Pittsburgh is pointing cameras at its Asian kitchens faster than the kitchens have built the surface to receive that attention. Issue 02 will track who closed the gap.

items.name: Pusadee's Garden
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh Thai, stalled by a feed that posts twice a month and no TikTok account.

featured_tiktok.author: mad_i_libs
featured_tiktok.caption:
This Thai restaurant is a gorgeous spot for your next date night or special occasion in Pittsburgh! 💖 

There are so many food and drink options, for meat-eaters and vegans alike, you'll want to come back more than once. 🥂 

Tip: Show up

items.name: Everyday Noodles
items.descriptor: Second in Pittsburgh restaurants on review depth. No Instagram, no TikTok, and creators already filming.

featured_tiktok.author: sheseatingit
featured_tiktok.caption:
Everyday Noodles is my dream come true because I could eat noodles everyday.

#Pittsburgh #soupdumplings #xiaolongbao #pennsylvania #pittsburghsteelers

items.name: Mola
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sushi on review depth. The feed has gone nearly quiet.

featured_tiktok.author: zoetaylorrrfit
featured_tiktok.caption:
You already know .. do I even need to say anymore about how much I love Mola🍣🥢 my favorite sushi in Pittsburgh 

#pittsburghrestaurants #pgh #sushipittsburgh #fyp #sushilover

items.name: Atarashi
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sushi. The recent reviews are pulling in the other direction.

items.name: Bengal Kabab House & Restaurant
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh Indian, seventy-fourth in restaurants. The buffet has no feed.

items.name: Benihana - Pittsburgh
items.descriptor: Thirty-seventh in Pittsburgh restaurants on review depth. No social surface to catch what happens at every table.

items.name: Bombay To Burgh
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh Indian, twenty-sixth in restaurants. The social layer has not arrived yet.

items.name: Chao Phraya Thai Cuisine
items.descriptor: First in its tier, but zero photos and no hours on Google hold the ceiling down.
